executives.name: Mark Frewin
executives.background: Mr. Frewin is a lawyer with over 35 years of experience in the legal and mining sectors. He has held senior executive positions and directorships in several resource companies. He was previously a partner at McCarthy Tétrault LLP.

executives.name: Richard Parkhouse
executives.background: Mr. Parkhouse has over 30 years of experience in the financial services and resource sectors. He has held various senior management roles and has extensive experience in corporate finance and investor relations.

executives.name: Jorge Estepa
executives.background: Mr. Estepa is a corporate secretary and administrator with over 25 years of experience in the administration of publicly traded companies. He has served as an officer and director of several resource companies.

executives.name: Miles Thompson
executives.background: Mr. Thompson is a geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He is the founder and Chairman of Lara Exploration Ltd. and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits.

board_of_directors.name: Martin Rowley
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Rowley was a co-founder of First Quantum Minerals Ltd. and served as its Executive Director until 2017. He is currently the Chairman of Forsys Metals Corp. and has extensive experience in the mining industry.
